LanguageData.RobCoQuestIgnore: This is none of my concern.
LanguageData.RobCoQuestCourierEscapedText: The courier slipped away before you could finish the job. The platinum chip has vanished into the wasteland.
LanguageData.RobCoQuestCourierFledText: The courier detected your approach and fled the area. They did not leave empty-handed, but they have dropped the platinum chip behind.
LanguageData.RobCoQuestChipRecoveredText: The courier is dead. The platinum chip is yours, and {0} will not forgive the theft.
LanguageData.RobCoQuestTrailLostText: You traced the shipment, but the trail went cold before your scouts could pinpoint the courier's route.
LanguageData.RobCoQuestCourierInterceptedText: Your scouts have located {0}. A temporary field camp has been marked on your world map. Kill the courier within seven days and recover the platinum chip before it changes hands again.
LanguageData.RobCoQuestOptionLabel: Courier {0} of {1} and the Platinum Chip of {2}
LanguageData.RobCoQuestVaultClearedText: You leave the RobCo vault behind with its secrets stripped bare. Whatever remained in the facility is no longer anyone else's to command.
LanguageData.RobCoQuestBranch.RobCo_PlatinumBranch_CE: The dead courier carried access fragments tied to a RobCo executive archive. They point to a distant vault complex still crawling with corrupted Securitrons. Somewhere inside lies the wreck of Liberty Prime.
LanguageData.RobCoQuestBranch.RobCo_PlatinumBranch_PR: The courier's route logs reveal a remote RobCo cache where Chinese Liberators were stockpiled in absurd numbers. The archive also indicates that a War Machine chassis was lost there during containment failure.
LanguageData.RobCoQuestBranch.RobCo_PlatinumBranch_Ca: The courier carried fragments from the Calculator's command archives. They point to an abandoned RobCo data center where a Pacificator chassis was sealed beneath the steel.
LanguageData.RobCoQuestBranch.RobCo_PlatinumBranch_Th: The courier's logs point to a buried Big MT think tank vault. A giant Roboscorpion queen was kept there as a testbed for post-war battlefield intelligence.
LanguageData.RobCoQuestBranch.RobCo_PlatinumBranch_Un: The courier's route points to a forgotten university vault filled with synthetic personnel archives and dormant robotic test platforms.
